meta.description: A deployed instance of a service or application in a specific environment.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_562c6baa_22cc_457d_a62a_048d583397eb" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "environment" TEXT,
    "url" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_562c6baa_22cc_457d_a62a_048d583397eb" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_562c6baa22cc457d_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
